productName: Forbidden Fruit LR Sticky Frog High Terpene Sugar
description: Strain-true indica live resin from Forbidden Fruit: fresh-frozen flower preserves the brightest, gassiest, most aromatic terpenes for a rich, full-spectrum dab. Full-spectrum and bursting with terps, with notes of grapefruit, tropical, and tree fruit, delivering settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
